<!--
Thanks for the contribution! Please keep PRs focused and see
CONTRIBUTING.md for the conventions.
-->

### What & why

What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. `Closes #12`).

### Checklist

- [ ] `make test`, `make lint`, and `make vet` pass
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `example_test.go` and the README
- [ ] If a new server version was targeted, `TestedServerVersion`, the
      README matrix, and the CI image tags are updated together

### Notes

Anything reviewers should know — tradeoffs, follow-ups, or the
Audiobookshelf version you tested against.
